case_title: VERNON ANTHONY FRISON VS. ROBERTO VASQUEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ROBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVES, JOSE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF BAD ADDRESS. RECV'D PHONE CALL FROM OWNER OF BUSINESS, STATED THAT EMPLOYEE NO LONGER WORKS THERE AND WAS TERMINATED A WHILE BACK. (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ROBERTO
DECLARATION OF VERNON ANTHONY FRISON RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAY-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ROBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO AUG-14-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "PLAINTIFF WANTS A CONTINUANCE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT, TO ADD THE CORRECT DEFENDANT, JOSE CHAVEZ AND SERVE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ROBERTO VASQUEZ IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--ANA MUNOZ. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO OCT-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NICOLE CRAIG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO NOV-25-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. WINIFRED YAP--CAREGIVER APPEARED ON THE PLAINTIFFS BEHALF TO ASK FOR A CONTINUANCE. ACCORDING TO HER PLAINTIFF IS IN THE HOSPITAL. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVES, JOSE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON AMENDED CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
